title: Autocorrelation Function (ACF) of Stationary Models
description: A visual comparison of the theoretical Autocorrelation Function patterns for common stationary time series models.
relationships: White Noise ACF shows no significant correlations at any lag k>0
AR(1) model ACF shows a gradual exponential decay across lags
MA(1) model ACF shows a single significant spike at lag 1 then cuts off
